title: Verify the correct Save button is targeted when multiple identically-named buttons exist

steps.expected: The page displays three distinct panels, each with its own Save button

steps.action: Edit a value inside the middle panel
steps.expected: The middle panel's Save button becomes enabled

steps.action: Click the Save button that belongs to the middle panel (not the other two)
steps.expected: Only the middle panel's changes are persisted; the other two panels remain unchanged
